case_results.name: X-Echo header on /headers route returns hello-world
lowercase content-type on /headers route returns application/json (case-insensitive name match)
X-Custom-Name header on /headers route returns first-value
missing header on /empty route returns error
non-200 status on /404 route returns error even though X-Echo header is present
non-200 status on /no-such-route returns error
